# Kevin Haulihan

> Kevin Haulihan is an Emmy-winning director, writer, and producer working across linear
> broadcast, new media, and the scripted-podcast space — in both long and short form. With LA
> Times Studios he has developed and created content for brands including Apple, Amazon Music,
> Disney, and Pfizer. He was formerly Director of Development at World of Wonder Productions.

## Site

- [Home](https://cportka.github.io/kevin-website/): reel, selected work, and about.

## Selected work

- Sign Off — director (podcast)
- Unbelievable Things: Medical Misinformation — creator (LA Times Studios)
- Hoppus on Music — writer / producer
- RuPaul's Drag Race — consulting producer
- The Trixie & Katya Show — writer / supervising producer
- No, You Shut Up! — writer / supervising producer
- Not Today Bianca — supervising producer
- VH1 Best Week Ever — producer
- Actors Roundtable — series producer
- Wake Up — co-creator, producer, director & editor (podcast)

## Contact

- For inquiries, see the site above.
